name: maze of caves
description: I'm in a maze of caves
hints: A maze room with five exits - more than the others! D leads out of the maze entirely.
D goes down to the ancient cave (room 17) - this is the connection between the cave maze and the main underground.
This is the maze exit room. D=ancient cave. The other directions loop back into the maze.
N=28. S=27. E=26. W=25. D=ancient cave (17). Use D to escape the maze to the main underground area.
notes: Maze room with 5 exits. D=ancient cave (17) - maze exit to main underground. N=28. S=27. E=26. W=25.
